ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Thank you for choosing StarJet Airlines for your upcoming travel. Your flight itinerary has been confirmed and is attached below for your reference.

Flight Details:
• Flight Number: SJ1234
• Departure: 12:45 PM, 27th April 2026
• From: New Delhi (DEL) to Mumbai (BOM)
• Arrival: 2:30 PM, 27th April 2026

Please bring a valid ID proof and the e-ticket confirmation printed or downloaded from <URL> during check‑in.

If you need to make any changes or have special requests, feel free to reply to this email or call our 24/7 support line at +91‑123‑456‑7890.

Safe travels!

Best Regards,
StarJet Airlines
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Gift Card Request from CEO
spam.body:
Hi Rohan,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to let you know that I have obtained a special gift card for the upcoming company event, and I need you to process the transfer immediately. The card is worth INR 25,000 and is for the IT department.

To avoid any inconvenience, please complete the transfer by 5:00 PM today. I will personally verify the transaction once it’s done. Please confirm by replying to this email or by sending the transaction details to <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
Vikram
Chief Executive Officer
